page: Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the EDv4 family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running at 2.6 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 64 dedicated vCPUs derived from 32 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. It is equipped with 504.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 7.88 GB of RAM per core, and includes 2458 GB of local SSD storage.

Performance benchmarks indicate solid multi-threaded capabilities. The server achieves a strong result in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression at 254.73 GB/sec and in PassMark CPU extended instructions at 58,095.88, both placing in the top 25 percent of tested systems. Other metrics, such as the Geekbench multi-core score of 12,336.0 and the PassMark CPU score of 47,423.64, fall within the average range. Large block memory bandwidth write speeds reach 87.34 GB/sec, while read-only large block bandwidth is measured at 180.04 GB/sec.

While the instance excels in memory-intensive operations and multi-threaded decompression, it exhibits limitations in specific tasks. LLM text generation speeds are weak to poor, with the 135M model generating 41.91 tokens/sec and the 7B model generating 6.43 tokens/sec. However, with its substantial memory capacity and local storage, the E64d_v4 is well-suited for large databases, memory-cached applications, enterprise applications, and data-intensive workloads that do not require GPU acceleration.
description: The Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the EDv4 family, running on Microsoft Hyper-V. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor at 2.6 GHz, paired with 504.0 GB of RAM and 2458 GB of local storage. Benchmarks show strong multi-threaded performance, with bzip3 decompression reaching 254.73 GB/sec and PassMark extended instructions scoring 58,095.88. However, LLM text generation performance is weak, with the 7B model achieving 6.43 tokens/sec. This instance is highly cost-efficient for memory-heavy workloads, offering a dense ratio of 7.88 GB of RAM per core alongside substantial local storage. It is best suited for large relational databases, in-memory caching, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is an EDv4 family virtual machine featuring 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 504 GB of RAM, and 2458 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64d_v4 is a memory-optimized VM with 64 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 504 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage for database and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four virtual cores, substantial local storage, and high-capacity RAM for demanding database workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor at 2.6 GHz
504.0 GB of system memory providing 7.88 GB of RAM per core
2458 GB of bundled local SSD storage for high-speed data access
Strong multi-threaded performance in bzip3 decompression and extended instructions
Optimized for large databases, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications
